mainEntity.name: What are the key differences between GEO and traditional SEO for Los Angeles law firms?
mainEntity.text: What are the key differences between GEO and traditional SEO for Los Angeles law firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: GEO optimizes content for AI models like ChatGPT to cite directly in responses, emphasizing structured data and citability, while traditional SEO targets Google rankings via keywords and backlinks. LA firms need both for hybrid visibility.

suggestedAnswer.text: For LA firms, GEO focuses on AI interpretability with FAQs and schema for practice areas, boosting citation frequency by 40-115% per studies. Traditional SEO builds domain authority via local links. Combine by auditing AI visibility monthly; GEO excels in conversational queries like 'best LA personal injury lawyer.'

name: GEO vs Traditional SEO for Los Angeles Law Firms
description: GEO optimizes content for AI models like ChatGPT to cite directly in responses, emphasizing structured data and citability, while traditional SEO targets Google
